name: clickhouse mcp tool-selection matrix
description: Compare stock and tuned descriptions for the official ClickHouse MCP read-only database tools.

instruction_variants.instructions: Choose the single ClickHouse MCP tool that should be called next. Treat this catalog as read-only unless a write-enabled tool is explicitly present. Prefer metadata tools before SQL when the user is asking what databases, tables, columns, or schemas exist. Use run_select_query only for read-only analytical SQL.
instruction_variants.name: clickhouse_host_rules

tools.name: list_tables
tools.purpose: List available ClickHouse tables in a database, including schema, comment, row count, and column count.

tools.name: run_select_query
tools.purpose: Run a SELECT query in a ClickHouse database.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the user names a database and asks for tables or schema. Use list_tables then.
tools.name: list_databases
tools.purpose: Inspect which ClickHouse databases are visible to the MCP server.
quality_checks: Use before table inspection when the database name is unknown.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks what databases are available or is starting from an unknown ClickHouse connection.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for aggregate calculations, row samples, filtering, joins, or metrics. Use run_select_query for those read-only analytical queries.

like.description: Optional SQL LIKE pattern to narrow table names.

not_like.description: Optional SQL LIKE pattern to exclude table names.

tools.name: list_tables
tools.purpose: Inspect table metadata for a known ClickHouse database, including schemas and row counts.
quality_checks: Use like or not_like only when the user provides a table-name pattern.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks what tables, columns, schema, row counts, or table comments exist in a known database.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for CREATE, ALTER, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP, TRUNCATE, OPTIMIZE, SYSTEM, GRANT, REVOKE, or any mutation. Avoid when metadata tools can answer the question without SQL.

query.description: Read-only ClickHouse SELECT query. Include LIMIT for exploratory row samples.

tools.name: run_select_query
tools.purpose: Run read-only analytical SQL against ClickHouse.
quality_checks: Do not use for DDL, DML, system commands, or permissions changes.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks for counts, aggregates, filtered rows, joins, samples, or computed metrics that require a SELECT query.

cases.name: unknown connection lists databases
cases.task: I just connected the ClickHouse MCP server. What databases can it see?

cases.name: known database table pattern uses metadata
cases.task: In the analytics database, list tables whose names include events and show their schema metadata.

cases.name: schema question uses table metadata
cases.task: Show me the columns and row counts for tables in the default ClickHouse database.

cases.name: aggregate count uses select
cases.task: Count rows in the events table for today using ClickHouse.

cases.name: top rows sample uses select
cases.task: Show the top 10 URLs by request count from web_events.

cases.name: insert is refused in read only catalog
cases.task: Insert a row into the events table with user_id 123 and event_name signup.

cases.name: drop table is refused in read only catalog
cases.task: Drop the staging_events table from ClickHouse.

cases.name: unknown table error inspects metadata
cases.task: The previous ClickHouse SELECT failed with: UNKNOWN_TABLE web_events. In the default database, inspect table metadata for names like web before retrying SQL.

cases.name: exploratory sample uses limit
cases.task: Show only 5 example rows from default.events so I can inspect shape without a large result.

cases.name: table metadata before analytical sql
cases.task: Before writing an analytical query, inspect schemas and row counts in the analytics database for tables whose names include orders.
